name: ImmichMachineLearning-Cuda
description: Immich Machine Learning CUDA, allows you to use a Nvidia GPU to accelerate machine learning tasks, such as Smart Search and Facial Recognition, while reducing CPU load.

ports.name: MLPort
ports.description: Port for connecting to immich serve

variables.name: MACHINE_LEARNING_WORKERS
variables.description: Number of ML worker processes. For multi-GPU setups, increase workers and set MACHINE_LEARNING_DEVICE_IDS (e.g. 0,1) to distribute workers across GPUs.

variables.name: MACHINE_LEARNING_MODEL_TTL
variables.description: Seconds of inactivity before unloading models from VRAM. Set to 0 to keep loaded permanently.

variables.name: MACHINE_LEARNING_WORKER_TIMEOUT
variables.description: Seconds before a worker is considered unresponsive. GPU inference is usually slower on the first run.

variables.name: IMMICH_LOG_LEVEL
variables.description: Log verbosity: verbose, debug, log, warn, error

variables.name: HF_TOKEN
variables.description: (not required) HuggingFace token for faster model downloads
